meaning: 贝宁湾(几内亚湾一部分,靠西非的尼日利亚、贝宁和多哥等国)
examples: The other countries are Senegal, Cameroon, Benin, Togo and Chad.
The young men who had left to work in Togo or Benin returned home.
In West Africa, Benin, Ghana, Nigeria and Togo have had outbreaks in 2007.
However, they could be overtaken by Cameroon or Ivory Coast, who are away in Sudan and Benin respectively.
Burkina Faso, Gabon and Benin are the other countries expected to feature in the competition.
